title: Sporobolus borszczowii
taxonomy: Sporobolus borszczowii is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a type of grass that belongs to the genus Sporobolus. This species is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is also known as Borszczow's dropseed. The classification of Sporobolus borszczowii is further divided into its full botanical classification.
